title: Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Lotion (1x 300ml) With Soothing Triple Oat Complex & Shea Butter, 72-Hour Intense Hydration, Helps Relieve Dryness and Tightness, Suitable for Sensitive Skin

features: Prebiotic Triple Oat Complex and Shea Butter - Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Lotion is formulated with a prebiotic triple oat complex* (colloidal oats, oat oil, oat extract) and shea butter; the body moisturiser helps improve the balance of the skin's natural microbiome, leaving skin more resilient and healthy looking from day one; *in vitro test

24 Hour Moisturisation - Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Body Lotion, for men and women, is clinically proven to moisturise for 24 hours providing immediate, long-lasting relief for very dry, irritable skin

Soothes Skin from Day 1 - Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Lotion provides immediate relief from dryness; it is clinically proven to moisturise and soothe, intensely nourishing very dry, sensitive and irritable skin
Fast Absorbing and Unscented - This lotion is fast absorbing and unscented, for healthy looking skin that feels softer
Suitable for Sensitive Skin - Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Lotion actively moisturises dry, sensitive skin and is gentle enough for everyday use
Moisturising Lotion with naturally active Triple Oat Complex for extra dry, irritable and sensitive skin
description: Product Description Aveeno Skin Relief Moisturising Lotion is clinically proven to intensely hydrate for 72-Hours* and to help heal very dry and itchy skin. Expertly formulated with soothing triple oat complex (oat extract, oat flour, and oat oil) and shea butter, strengthens the protective skin’s natural barrier to help protect the skin against external aggressors and supports the skin's natural ceramide production. s Its unscented, hypoallergenic† and vegan formula‡ is clinically proven suitable for dry and sensitive skin. It is also non-greasy and fast absorbing. *after 4 weeks continuous use. †Formulated to minimise the risk of allergies. ‡does not contain animal derived ingredients. Indications Very dry, irritable skin Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Petrolatum, Isopropyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Flour, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Oil, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Extract, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Caprylyl Glycol, Steareth-20, Sodium Chloride, Tocopherol, Potassium Sorbate. [PR-0003488] Safety Warning FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY See more
